race.comment: WORTHY GEM (3) raced on the speed from the outset when resuming last start and finished second, beaten 2.5 lengths, over 1000m at Townsville. In the right race this time and shapes as a key runner. OSTUNI (6) finished out of the money on debut two starts back then she got a long way back and was beaten 3.5 lengths when fourth in a 1000m contest at Townsville three weeks ago. Suitably placed so anticipating a big run this time. FIDDICHFIRE (1) is facing the starter for the first time and any market support must be noted. PRINCESS KNOWITALL (4) gets Wiggins on top and may earn some minor money. RAAR (7) likely to add some value, if he can improve on his run here last time.
